raw_consumer_statement: A fraudulent Costco XXXX XXXX was opened in XXXX. I contacted XXXX and informed them of identify theft after they began calling my mother 's cell phone and harassing her for a past due payment. I gave them my phone number but they continue to call my mother and me. I filed a police report and gave XXXX that report # and they are still sending bills and having collectors call. I drove to the XXXX costco and affirmed it is not me as the photo is of an XXXX male and the purchase was made in XXXX  where I've not lived for XXXX years. I've written numerous notes on the continued bills - that are accruing late fees and interest - paying for postage to get XXXX to stop sending bills and calling. I've called numerous times to ask them to close the account and also confirm I am not having this reported incorrectly on my credit bureau. There is a different XXXX rep every time and they claim they'll take care of it but we continue to get calls and statements which is causing us stress and wasting our time.
